prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Find all Python source files in django/django that implement model field validators: the built-in validator functions (MaxLengthValidator, MinValueValidator, EmailValidator, URLValidator), the field-level validate() method, and the full_clean() validation pipeline.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the django-web-framework fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Find all Python source files in django/django that implement model field validators: the built-in validator functions (MaxLengthValidator, MinValueValidator, EmailValidator, URLValidator), the field-level validate() method, and the full_clean() validation pipeline.
